items.title: Mutant
items.description: Human altered by radiation, magic, or supernatural influence

items.title: Enhanced Human
items.description: Augmented through science, magic, or experimentation

items.title: Failed Experiment
items.description: Unstable being resulting from unnatural creation

items.title: Vampire Hound
items.description: Ghoul-like tracker or enforcer bound to a vampire

items.title: Demon Hound
items.description: Infernal beast serving a demonic entity

items.title: Spirit Hound
items.description: Otherworldly tracker tied to spirits or the umbra

items.title: Blood Servitor
items.description: Lesser being sustained by vitae or supernatural essence

items.title: Hunter Hound
items.description: A mortal animal, usually pet, imbued with hunter powers

items.title: Fomori
items.description: Human or animal corrupted and possessed by Wyrm entities

items.title: Blighted Creature
items.description: Animal or being warped by corruption or decay

items.title: Tainted Hybrid
items.description: Mixed being altered beyond natural form

items.title: Demonic Fauna
items.description: Animals twisted by infernal influence

items.title: Spirit Fauna
items.description: Animal-like spirits manifesting in the physical or umbral world

items.title: Ghost Fauna
items.description: Echoes of animals lingering after death

items.title: Chimerical Animal
items.description: Dream-born or fae-touched creature

items.title: Strange Flora
items.description: Plants with unusual or supernatural properties

items.title: Carnivorous Flora
items.description: Plants that actively hunt or consume prey

items.title: Corrupted Flora
items.description: Vegetation warped by dark forces

items.title: Sentient Plant
items.description: Plant life with awareness or intelligence

items.title: Supernatural Parasite
items.description: Entity that feeds on hosts physically or spiritually

items.title: Symbiotic Entity
items.description: Lives with a host, granting power at a cost

items.title: Infestation
items.description: Swarm or collective of lesser creatures acting as one

items.title: Mage Familiar
items.description: An lower being touched by gnosis or magic, bonded to a mage or sorcerer

items.title: Angelic Kin
items.description: An lower being adapted or evolved from angelic origins planes

items.title: Vampire Kin
items.description: An lower being adapted or evolved from vampiric origins or experiments

items.title: Demonic Kin
items.description: An lower being adapted or evolved from demonic origins planes

items.title: Ghost Fauna
items.description: An lower being adapted or evolved from umbral origins

items.title: Liminal Entity
items.description: Exists in transitional or boundary spaces

items.title: Echo Being
items.description: Residual presence repeating actions or patterns

items.title: Anomalous Being
items.description: Defies normal classification or rules of reality

items.title: Prototype Entity
items.description: Early-stage or experimental creation

items.title: Autonomous Construct
items.description: Artificial being acting independently

items.title: Territorial Entity
items.description: Embodiment of a specific place or domain

items.title: Weather Entity
items.description: Linked to storms or environmental phenomena
